title: Workflow Automation: Make.com / Zapier / n8n
overview: Make.com, Zapier, aur n8n platforms use karke business workflows, API connectivity aur automated background processes design aur implement karna seekhein.
objectives: Workflow automation concepts (Triggers, Actions, Filters) master karna.
Multi-step automated operations build aur setup karna.
Error handling logic workflows aur routing configurations custom rules setup karna.
Upwork / Fiverr portfolio layouts case study design publish launch.

phases.title: Phase 1: Basic Scenarios (Weeks 1-2)
phases.desc: Setting up accounts, simple trigger-to-action connections, filtering data.

phases.title: Phase 2: Complex Router Integrations (Week 3)
phases.desc: Conditional routing paths, data formatting functions, error fallback paths.

phases.title: Phase 3: AI Integration & Business Launch (Week 4)
phases.desc: Injecting AI completion APIs in workflows, freelance agency pricing setups.

lessons.title: Triggers, Actions, and Workflows Architecture
lessons.content:
Automation pipelines businesses ke daily redundant tasks minimize karte hain. 

### Primary Nodes:
- **Trigger**: Event jo workflow kickstart karta hai (e.g. New email check, webhook event reception).
- **Action**: Operative steps executables (e.g. Append database row, post status update).
- **Webhooks**: Real-time push updates framework communication data transfer.
lessons.diagram: User lead capture form -> Webhook dispatch -> Trigger activation -> Actions execution

quiz.question: Workflows trigger and action pipelines me webhook communication data format standard kya hai?
quiz.explanation: JSON is the universal REST standard data structure for passing webhook transaction details.

assignment.title: Design validation trigger testing environment task
assignment.prompt: Create a dummy webhook capture module and capture output variables values lists.

lessons.title: Conditional Routing and Advanced Routers in Make.com
lessons.content:
Workflows parameters analysis filters execution settings validations control pipelines setup logic.

### Advanced Tools:
- **Routers**: Split paths dynamically based on data attributes values.
- **Filters**: Halt execution if parameters criteria mismatch rules.
lessons.diagram: Ingress Lead -> Router split -> [Path A: Enterprise notification] [Path B: Standard auto-reply]

quiz.question: Workflows routing execution paths conditional parameters checks filters logic based on:
options: Incoming webhook payload data attributes values list
Local directory file properties listings metadata
Standard API connection auth headers criteria
quiz.explanation: Filters evaluate data values extracted from preceding steps in the active execution scenario.

assignment.title: Implement an automated CRM routing pipeline task
assignment.prompt: Setup conditional routes linking inbound sales leads sheet to dedicated Slack channels based on business size.

lessons.title: Embedding AI/LLM Nodes inside background workflows pipelines
lessons.content: Adding smart modules (GPT / Claude APIs) inside workflows unlocks intelligent operations like email draft analysis, auto-responses, content classification.
lessons.diagram: Inbound Customer Email -> OpenAI node (Draft resolution) -> Gmail node (Send Draft as reply)

quiz.question: AI workflow nodes parameters must include structured formatting instructions to prevent:
options: Unpredictable text formatting and database parser errors
IP blacklist blocks from email servers
quiz.explanation: Strict formats prevent downstream applications parsers from failing.

assignment.title: Deploy an AI customer support reply workflow scenario
assignment.prompt: Setup a n8n scenario connecting email inbox to OpenAI API for draft reply generation.

lessons.title: Packaging workflows as SaaS solutions and selling automation services
lessons.content: Automations consultants package custom pipelines, pricing strategies, Upwork profile optimization frameworks.
lessons.code: FREELANCE_AUTOMATION_PITCH = "I will save your team 15 hours/week by automating lead-capture pipeline"
lessons.diagram: Client current slow manual flow -> Proposed automated workflow -> Pitch deck presentation

quiz.question: Automation services sales arguments focus primarily on:
options: Hours of manual tasks eliminated and error rate reductions
The number of active nodes inside scenarios lists
API subscription counts of platforms used
IP proxy addresses routing rules lists
quiz.explanation: Client ROI metrics are determined by hours saved and operations speedups.

assignment.title: Compile an automation case study proposal dashboard
assignment.prompt: Write a complete workflow audit case study for an e-commerce retail warehouse automation.

capstone.title: Automated Multi-Channel Lead Nurturing & CRM Sync System
capstone.description: Construct an end-to-end multi-app automation system in Make.com/n8n that listens to Stripe transaction webhooks, logs to Google Sheets, creates Salesforce contact profiles, and drafts AI onboarding emails.

interview_questions.question: How do you handle API rate limits and execution errors in Make.com?
interview_questions.answer: Implement error handling routing blocks (Break, Resume, Rollback, Ignore) at the specific node level. Configure automatic retry loops with exponential backoffs to prevent total scenario crashes.
